title: Lottery Lover
writer: Sig Herzig, Franz Schulz, Billy Wilder
actors: Lew Ayres, Pat Paterson, Peggy Fears
plot: A crew of young military-school cadets are enjoying their first weekend in Paris. Frank Harrington, a girl-shy cadet, wins the lottery which "They" have organized, an Frank wins the right to woo the star of the Folies Bergere, Gab...
